For Med Spas & Aesthetic Practices

The Consult Request You Did Not Answer in Time Booked Somewhere Else.

A potential client fills out a form or sends a message at 8pm. If no one responds until the next morning, there is a good chance they are already booked with a competitor. Speed-to-response is the single biggest factor in converting aesthetic inquiries.

Get a Free Custom Video Breakdown

Where the Jobs Are Slipping Through

These are the gaps that cost local businesses work every week. Most owners know something is off. They just have not had the time to fix it.

1

Consult Requests Going Cold Overnight

Clients searching for fillers, laser treatments, or body contouring are not waiting. They are comparing two or three practices at once, and the first one that responds gets the consult. A text back in under 60 seconds, even outside business hours, keeps them in the conversation until your staff is ready to follow up properly.

2

No-Shows That Could Have Been Prevented

Most no-shows happen because there was no confirmation sequence. A well-timed set of reminder texts in the 48 to 72 hours before an appointment, with a simple confirm or reschedule option, reduces no-shows significantly. No extra work for your front desk. The sequence runs on its own.

3

Clients Who Book Once and Disappear

Every treatment plan has a natural follow-up point. A client who got Botox 10 weeks ago is ready for a touch-up. A client who did a peel three months ago is a candidate for the next phase. Most practices never reach out at the right time. A short reactivation message timed to the treatment cycle brings clients back without running a promotion or paying for ads.

4

Competitors Answering Faster

Aesthetic medicine in your area is competitive. A client comparing two or three practices will often choose based on who made them feel heard first. A fast, professional response, even an automated first contact, sets the tone before you ever speak to them.

A System That Responds When Your Staff Cannot

The Client Capture Engine handles the gap between when a client reaches out and when your team is available. Missed calls get a text back in under 60 seconds. New consult requests trigger an immediate response followed by a short follow-up sequence. Clients at the right stage in their treatment cycle get a reactivation message automatically. Reviews go out after completed services.

1

Missed Call Text-Back

Any call you cannot answer gets an automatic text back in under 60 seconds. The conversation starts before they find the next number to call.

2

Lead & Quote Follow-Up

New leads and sent quotes trigger an automatic follow-up sequence over 10 to 14 days. You never manually chase a lead again.

3

Review Generation

After a job is complete, an automatic review request goes out by text. More 5-star reviews without asking your staff to remember to do it.

Nothing in Your Current Setup Changes

We do not touch your booking system, your patient records, or your EMR. Whatever practice management software you use stays exactly as it is. We sit in front of those systems and handle only first contact, follow-up, and review generation.

Want to See What a Faster Response Looks Like for Your Practice?

Get a free custom video breakdown. I will walk through your current setup and show you where consult requests are falling through.
